allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const b=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/Usuario/Documents/Programming/Chesskit/public/favicon.ico'\); console.log\('Size bytes:', b.length\); const count=b.readUInt16LE\(4\); console.log\('Images in ICO:', count\); for\(let i=0;i<count;i++\){const o=6+i*16; console.log\('  Image',i,': w=',b[o]||256,'h=',b[o+1]||256,'bpp=',b[o+6]\)};")
